title: Agent Frontmatter Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating YAML frontmatter in agent system_prompt.mdc files

role.description: Agent's primary role or professional identity

trigger_command.description: Slash command to explicitly activate agent (e.g., '/dev')

core_skills.description: Mandatory skills — always loaded for this agent. Use sparingly (1–3 items).

preferred_skills.description: Skills with distance boost in semantic search. Loaded when query matches them.

capable_skills.description: Skills in semantic pool with base weight. Loaded only when query strongly matches (embedding + keyword).

preferred_implants.description: Cognitive implants ranked above semantic candidates. Loaded in standard/deep tiers.

skills.description: DEPRECATED: Use core_skills / preferred_skills / capable_skills instead.

static_skills.description: REMOVED: The engine never consumed this field. Use core_skills + preferred_skills + capable_skills.

capabilities.description: REMOVED: Capability bundles are gone. Skills are now declared per-agent in core_skills/preferred_skills/capable_skills.

context.description: REMOVED: context.file_globs was never consumed by the engine. Routing uses routing.domain_keywords + semantic search, not file types.

file_globs.description: REMOVED: never consumed by the engine. See `context` deprecated_fields entry.
